PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'packages/espresso/src/.*\.ts$'; then cd packages/espresso && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20; fi

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '/dist/'; then echo 'ERROR: Do not edit dist/ files — they are build output. Edit src/ instead.'; exit 1; fi
